# Paul Fraioli

> Personal website for Paul Fraioli, a Washington, DC-based expert on the geopolitics of technology, geo-economics, nuclear weapons and US foreign policy. He is Senior Fellow for Technology, Geopolitics and Strategy at the IISS and editor of Strategic Comments.

## Core Page

- [Paul Fraioli](https://www.paulfraioli.com/): canonical personal website and profile hub.
- [Strategic Comments](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/tstc20): journal published by Routledge.
- [Strange Days: AI and the Next Industrial Revolution](https://www.paulfraioli.com/publications/strange-days-ai-next-industrial-revolution.pdf): featured PDF publication.

## Institutional Biography

- [International Institute for Strategic Studies biography](https://www.iiss.org/people/editors/paul-fraioli/): institutional biography for Paul Fraioli.

## Research and Professional Identifiers

- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0004-2133-8788)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=N9_wENUAAAAJ)
- [Web of Science](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/QJW-7394-2026)
- [Scopus](https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=59227862600)
- [SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=11911528)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/paulfraioli/)
- [𝕏](https://x.com/pfraioli)

## Topics

- Geopolitics of technology
- Global security and defence
- Geo-economics
- Nuclear weapons issues
- US foreign policy
- Artificial intelligence
- International economic and industrial policy-making
- Strategic competition
- Risk assessment and forecasting
